text.message: I admit i'm in 2nd, but lets not lose track of the bigger picture guys!
game will end soon with u
i have to city to win, in the meantime you getroad
road is only yours blue so I'm still behind u
well, oj is falling for your table talk, so well done
and now black with another city in hand
stop it blue.. no one is blind
But only because it was handed to you
good table talk man, it worked
